name: NuLegacy Gold Corporation
description: NuLegacy Gold Corporation is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and delineation of gold resources. The company specializes in exploring for high-grade Carlin-style gold deposits within its portfolio of properties in the United States, with a primary focus on its 108 square kilometer district-scale Red Hill property located in the prolific Cortez Trend of Nevada. Incorporated in 2009 and headquartered in Vancouver, NuLegacy is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol NUG and on the OTCQB market.
